download_method_description: {{count}} items selected. Proxy modes provide progress, cancellation, and retry controls.
download_proxy_file_desc: Transfer in this page with visible progress and cancellation.
download_proxy_archive_desc: The backend keeps the existing archive rules while the page manages transfer and saving.
download_to_folder_desc: Choose a local directory and preserve the selected folder structure.
download_directory_fallback: This browser cannot write to a selected directory, so the action falls back to a proxy ZIP download.
download_browser_default_desc: Let the browser handle the download and save location directly.
download_browser_archive_desc: Let the backend package the selection and hand the ZIP directly to the browser.
download_memory_fallback: Streaming file writes are not available, so this download is buffered in memory.
download_items_failed: Some files failed. Retry the failed items when ready.
download_directory_unsupported: This browser does not support choosing a local directory.
